title: The Destruction of Records Act, 1917
full_text: The Destruction of Records Act, 1917 अभिलेख नाश-करण अधिनियम,1917 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 191705 Act Number: 05 Enactment Date: 1917-02-28 Act Year: 1917 Short Title: The Destruction of Records Act, 1917 Hindi Title: अभिलेख नाश-करण अधिनियम,1917 Long Title: An Act to consolidate and amend the law providing for the destruction or other disposal of certain documents in the possession or custody of Courts and Revenue and other public officers. Ministry: Ministry of Law and Justice Department: Legislative Department Enforcement Date: 28-02-1917 Last Updated: 03-12-2018 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Destruction of Records Act, 1917 Show all section Section 1. Short title. Extent. Section 2. [Repealed.]. Section 3. Power to certain authorities to make rules for disposal of documents. Section 4. Validation of former rules for disposal of documents. Section 5. Saving of certain documents. Section 6. [Repealed.].
